note: the charter's own worked examples (Tysha reveal, hairnet-adjacent divergence) as a stable, low-threshold fork-hub floor. Invariant-mode (membership + a degree floor), not an exact top-N dump — the graph grows and new causal edges can reorder/extend the ranking.

the charter's Oberyn-fork example (gregor-confesses-and-kills-oberyn CAUSES jaime-frees-tyrion-from-the-black-cells AND arrest-of-the-sand-snakes -- out-degree 2, the canonical divergence-hub shape) must clear the min_out=2 floor.

multi-attributed convergence characters (Dany/Stannis pull causal edges from several independent chains) as a stable join-hub floor -- these are exactly the kind of node the causal-chain build's multi-attributed HARD-STOP protects against chaining INTO.

the design-doc verification anchor: both endpoints descend from the hairnet/purple-wedding cluster. sansa-receives-the-poisoned-hairnet is the sole shared upstream ancestor (CAUSES-only default); both share several downstream descendants (Tyrion's escape arc, the Golden Company); the Tysha reveal + Oberyn's death sit in the offset/shared-middle band (upstream of one strand, downstream of the other).
braid on a single slug is a usage error, not a degenerate one-strand braid -- restated here as a golden case so the error path doesn't silently regress into a crash.
